w:r.w:t: Photo of Aeration Tanks and/or Control Valves
Check there is a small gap
BOV and Motor cooling connections secure.
Discharge Flex coupling installed and free
Discharge Check Valve installed and direction
Discharge Isolation Valve Installed and Open
Blower Enclosure closed ready for Power up.
Power to blower is present, Blower ELCB OFF
lower ELCB to remain off until corrected.
HMI Display boots up , Correct Graphics
Step Change in PID control point
Does the PID overshoot the Set point (value)
SV value to initiate starting of
Time to run prior to starting assist blower
Control PID reset on assist blower BOV close
SV value to initiate stopping of assist blower
Control PID reset on assist blower stop
Running blower SV on assist blower stop
